query: List all segment audiences connected to the destination named 'Lives on East Coast', showing audienceId, name, totalProfiles, createdTime, updatedTime, and used in other audience count for each audience. Remove any row limit from the results.

trace.sql: SELECT s.SEGMENTID AS audienceId, s.NAME AS name, s.TOTALMEMBERS AS totalProfiles, s.CREATEDTIME AS createdTime, s.UPDATEDTIME AS updatedTime, COUNT(dep.DEPENDENTSEGMENTID) AS used_in_other_audience_count FROM dim_segment s JOIN hkg_br_segment_target st ON s.SEGMENTID = st.SEGMENTID JOIN dim_target t ON st.TARGETID = t.TARGETID LEFT JOIN hkg_br_base_segment_used_by_dependent_segment dep ON s.SEGMENTID = dep.SEGMENTID WHERE t.NAME = 'Lives on East Coast' OR t.DATAFLOWNAME = 'Lives on East Coast' GROUP BY s.SEGMENTID, s.NAME, s.TOTALMEMBERS, s.CREATEDTIME, s.UPDATEDTIME
warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file

trace.sql: SELECT TARGETID, NAME, DATAFLOWNAME FROM dim_target
warnings: Skipped hkg_br_property_property.parquet: Invalid Input Error: Failed to read Parquet file 'DBSnapshot/hkg_br_property_property.parquet': Need at least one non-root column in the file

test create doug
Loyalty Enrollment Propensity High — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Profiles with propensity for loyalty program enrollment above 0.65. Tests: confirmed propensityForLoyaltyProgram field name.

children.name: Full Profile Color Pref and Advisor — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Fully profiled members with color preference and advisor assigned. Tests: rule 4 (two IS NOT NULL checks).

children.name: Any Points Redeemed — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Profiles who have redeemed at least one loyalty point. Tests: numeric comparison on loyaltyPointsRedeemed.

children.name: West Coast Big Spender — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: West Coast profiles with lifetime order total above 500. Tests: homeAddress.region string equality + numeric comparison.

children.name: Cobranded Card Candidate — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Enrolled members with high cobranded card propensity. Tests: confirmed propensity field + IS NOT NULL rule 4.

children.name: Platinum High Orders — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Platinum members with more than 5 orders YTD. Tests: equality + numeric comparison on two loyalty fields.

children.name: High Upgrade Propensity — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Profiles with propensity for loyalty status upgrade above 0.7. Tests: confirmed propensity field name.

children.name: High Points Silver-Plus — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Members with 1000+ points in silver, gold, or platinum tier. Tests: rule 5 (IN list), numeric comparison.

children.name: Loyalty Bronze Tier — Clean Test Apr16
children.description: Profiles in bronze loyalty tier. Pure equality check — simplest possible PQL. Tests: rule 2 (string quoting).

children.name: Fully Profiled with Advisor and Preferences
children.description: Complete profile: color pref, size pref, advisor assigned, loyalty enrolled. Tests: rule 4 (four IS NOT NULL clauses — most thorough IS NOT NULL test).

children.name: All-Tier Non-Redeemer with High Points Balance
children.description: Members in any loyalty tier with 2500+ points and zero offer redemptions. Tests: rule 1 (==), rule 2, rule 5 (IN with 4 values).

children.name: Home and Garden Category — Loyalty Member
children.description: Loyalty members with Home and Garden category affinity. Tests: rule 1 (==), rule 2 (multi-word 'Home & Garden'), rule 4 (IS NOT NULL).

children.name: Northeast Premium Tier Member
children.description: Gold or platinum members in the Northeast region. Tests: rule 1 (==), rule 2 (multi-word 'Northeast'), rule 5 (IN list).

children.name: Silver or Gold Tier — Real-Time
children.description: Mid-tier loyalty members for real-time upgrade nudge decisioning. Tests: rule 2, rule 5 (IN list with two values).

children.name: Fully Profiled CC Propensity
children.description: Customers with stored size and color preferences plus moderate CC propensity — personalized offer targets

children.name: Advisory Relationship Platinum Clients
children.description: Platinum members with an assigned advisor — premium segment for white-glove campaign treatment

children.name: Eligible Offers Not Redeemed
children.description: Customers with 3+ eligible offers who have not redeemed any in the last 6 months — activation opportunity

children.name: South and Southeast Residents
children.description: Loyalty members in the South region for regional campaign and event targeting

children.name: High-Tier Non-Credit-Card Holders
children.description: Gold and platinum members who have not yet adopted the cobranded credit card — upgrade opportunity

children.name: Seasonal Shoppers
children.description: Loyalty members with 1-2 orders YTD indicating seasonal or event-driven purchase patterns

children.name: Non-Member Frequent Shoppers
children.description: Frequent shoppers without loyalty program membership — high-priority enrollment targets

answer: No destination named 'Lives on East Coast' was found in the system. The only available destination in the database is 'amazon-s3' (Dataflow: 'Activate segments to S3 Feed'). Consequently, there are no segment audiences connected to a destination named 'Lives on East Coast'.
